contract_claim: workspace: resolution discards range sematics. `workspace:^1.0.0`, `workspace:~1.0.0`, and `workspace:*` are all resolved to the bare version number (e.g. `1.2.3`) without a range prefix. This means `workspace:^` (which pnpm publishes as `^version`) becomes an exact pin, potentially breaking downstream consumers that expect a range.
observed_behavior: workspace: resolution discards range sematics. `workspace:^1.0.0`, `workspace:~1.0.0`, and `workspace:*` are all resolved to the bare version number (e.g. `1.2.3`) without a range prefix. This means `workspace:^` (which pnpm publishes as `^version`) becomes an exact pin, potentially breaking downstream consumers that expect a range.
